title: Bison Unicode text crashes bisonpre
body:
```
making verilator in src
make -C src
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/elike/verilator/src'
make -C obj_dbg -j 1  TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg.exe VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/elike/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
If you get errors from verilog.y below, try upgrading bison to version 1.875 or newer.
/mingw64/bin/python3 ../bisonpre --yacc /usr/bin/bison -d -v -o V3ParseBison.c ../verilog.y
  edit ../verilog.y V3ParseBison_pretmp.y
  C:/msys64/usr/bin/bison -d -v --report=itemset --report=lookahead -b V3ParseBison_pretmp -o V3ParseBison_pretmp.c V3ParseBison_pretmp.y
  edit V3ParseBison_pretmp.output V3ParseBison.output
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "C:\msys64\home\elike\verilator\src\bisonpre", line 552, in <module>
    process()
  File "C:\msys64\home\elike\verilator\src\bisonpre", line 42, in process
    clean_output(tmp_prefix() + ".output",
  File "C:\msys64\home\elike\verilator\src\bisonpre", line 105, in clean_output
    lines = fh.readlines()
UnicodeDecodeError: 'gbk' codec can't decode byte 0xa2 in position 7234: illegal multibyte sequence
make[2]: *** [../Makefile_obj:343: V3ParseBison.c] Error 1
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/elike/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[1]: *** [Makefile:65: ../bin/verilator_bin_dbg.exe] Error 2
make[1]: Leaving directory '/home/elike/verilator/src'
make: *** [Makefile:141: verilator_exe] Error 2

```
